chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 534 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on withdrawal statement. 2. For orders on CMA 1772/2025 (Ex) 3. For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **************** Today vakalatnama as well as statement has been filed by Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan Advocate. The statement is signed by Mr. Ghulam Abbass Akhter Advocate. He submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. We have verified the record and found the petitioner has himself filed withdrawal statement on 21.08.2024. Under such circumstances, this petition is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
